assistant.instructorUnavailable: Could not open the conversation. Please try again.

video.noVideoAttached: No video attached to this lesson yet.

post.noContent: No content for this lesson yet.

testPreview.noQuestions: This test has no questions yet.

FullReview.title: Full review
FullReview.detail: You see your answers, where you went wrong, and the correct answers.

AnswersAndCorrectness.title: No answer key
AnswersAndCorrectness.detail: You see your answers and where you went wrong — but never the correct answers.

AnswersOnly.title: Answers only
AnswersOnly.detail: You see the questions and what you answered. Nothing tells you whether it was right.

ScoreOnly.title: Closed
ScoreOnly.detail: You see your score and nothing else. The questions are not shown again.

lessonNotFound: Lesson not found in this course.

lesson.markCompleteFailed: Could not mark the lesson as complete. Please try again.

assistantHint.title: Stuck on something?
assistantHint.body: The AI tutor can see the lesson you are on and answer about it. The instructor is one message away too.
